core_mechanism: power-counting renormalization of a perturbative graph (Feynman-diagram) expansion: bounding the degree of divergence of each graph by a combinatorial-topological rule tied to its cellular/boundary structure, then systematically contracting the divergent subgraphs
brief_reason: The abstract builds an algorithm to locate divergences at the diagrams' bubble boundaries, isolates a class of graphs admitting a complete contraction procedure, and proves a complete power counting for them, which is exactly a power-counting-based renormalization/coarse-graining scheme on a perturbative graph expansion.
